_comment: event-bridge probe config. Copy to config.json (per worker) or point EVENT_BRIDGE_CONFIG at a per-worker file. Each probe: name (unique), cmd (argv array preferred; string runs via sh -c), interval_sec (>=5), source (event_source attr), timeout_sec (kill runaway probe). A probe prints NEW events one per line, nothing when idle. Adding a trigger = a new entry here + a probe script in adapters/. No core change.
